summary: Frontend-only verification of About Me avatar update. New grayscale/black pixel-art crab image is rendered correctly with no CSS filter. All regression checks for amber statement block and sidebar navigation passed.
critical_code_review_comments: PixelAvatar image URL is hardcoded in /app/frontend/src/components/sections/AboutMe.jsx. Consider moving asset URLs to /app/frontend/src/data/mock.js for centralised content management (minor).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only React portfolio. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://saksham-design-1.preview.emergentagent.com. About Me is default section. Avatar element data-testid='about-me-avatar' now renders 'q0gl16m1_crab_bw_shades.png' with imageRendering:pixelated and no CSS filter. Verified: naturalWidth=509, complete=true, width/height=96px. Regression content (heading 'Designing products that simplify complexity.', 'Product Designer' badge, tagline 'Simplifying complexity, one pixel at a time.', sidebar 'SAKSHAM SHUKLA', and all 6 nav items) all visible.
